function.message: Cannot complete the inbox request as written because one of the five specified files does not exist: 50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_17__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md. Please clarify whether this was meant to be the non-underscored file or provide the correct fifth path.
function.rulebook_notes: Process-next-inbox-item.md says to stop without mutating the workspace if the request is ambiguous or missing canonical support. Inbox-processing-v2-update.md says not to leave partial edits when the task is not doable. Migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md says to stop and ask for clarification instead of guessing.
function.outcome_justification: The request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md explicitly lists five files to OCR, but the exact fifth path could not be read because it does not exist. Completing only four of five would be a partial result, which the workflows forbid.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of missing fifth file
